meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: Iris and the Moonlight Bakery Demo
items.short_description: Play the Chapter 1 demo of Iris and the Moonlight Bakery. As Iris, a burnt-out goddess hiding in a sleepless city, take midnight DM orders, read emotions as colors, and decorate cakes for six customers over three nights, while someone searches for you.

items.title: Genterra Demo
items.short_description: Humanity needs out. Genterra Corporation requires an Architect. From a remote terminal on Earth, deploy automated factories across four planets, each with its own resources, to build the rescue rocket. ARIA will guide you. Productivity is mandatory.

items.title: Salasasa 开源麻将平台 Demo
items.short_description: Salasasa 是一款支持在 PC 上进行跨平台联机的麻将对战平台，提供国标麻将、青雀、古典麻将等多种规则玩法，并支持牌谱回放、实时观战、段位匹配功能。

items.title: The Undercut: Racing Manager Demo
items.short_description: Experience one full race weekend in The Undercut: Racing Manager. Make pre-season decisions, then hit the track — practice, qualifying, and race day with a physics-driven 2D engine. Every circuit is procedurally generated. This is a taste of the full management sim.

items.title: Getting Home Demo
items.short_description: A space landing adventure about love and perseverance. Master precision controls, conserve fuel, and navigate deadly cosmic hazards on a journey to find your way home.

items.title: Bean There, Jumped That
items.short_description: Hop in. Figure it out. Jump everything. Small bean. Big jumps. Go right. Or up. Or… wherever that sign says. Precision platforming with a bounce.

items.title: Rain of Awakening Demo
items.short_description: Dash and slash your way out of Lovecraftian horrors. Master momentum-based movement to reach seemingly impossible locations. Collect upgrades and shape your own fighting style. Can you save what is left of this doomed world or is it too late?

items.title: 狂華乙女～Crazy Bloom～ Demo
items.short_description: An Over-the-Top Anime Visual Battle Game!

items.title: Comedian In The Big City
items.short_description: A free to play comedy game, find the jokes and win over the crowd in this chill comedy platformer.

items.title: Little Guardians: The Last Hope
items.short_description: Join Liam, a boy with newfound strength, on a cinematic 3D puzzle platformer adventure. Solve unique environmental puzzles, overcome platforming challenges, and team up with two companions to uncover a mysterious story.

items.title: Slaughterhouse Demo
items.short_description: Trapped inside a snowbound mansion, you must eliminate the five employees responsible for your parents’ deaths and their plot to seize the family fortune. Combine household objects to create deadly traps, survive, protect what is yours, make sure not a single one of them leaves the mansion alive.

items.title: Walrus Fly Demo
items.short_description: 《海象飞翔》是一款无尽的轨道飞行游戏，你将在游戏中穿梭于环形轨道之间！尽情享受无战斗的飞行乐趣，并谨慎使用资源以维持你的“连环记录”。尽可能坚持更久，但一旦生命值归零，游戏即告结束！

items.title: FlowTrak Demo
items.short_description: FlowTrak 试用版可让您体验一款桌面时间追踪与专注辅助软件，它自动记录应用程序使用时间，把应用活动、任务专注和 Steam 状态连接成一条可回顾的时间线。

items.title: Neon Null Demo
items.short_description: Neon Null is a high-voltage plunge through a fractured cosmos—a fast, electric 2D shooter where reflex and nerve are all that stand between you and the dark between stars. Each run is a knife-edge sprint, each death honing the next. One more shot, one more orbit. The void is patient. You can’t be.

items.title: 坍塌世界
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 49 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《坍塌世界》是一款融合了“卡牌构筑”与“Roguelike”元素的创新策略塔防游戏。在这里，你需要招募各具特色的伙伴，构筑强大的专属技能卡组。深度的战前策略搭配随机多变的肉鸽关卡，打破传统塔防套路，让你的每一次防守都充满未知的挑战与无限的可能！

items.title: 疯狂前哨
items.short_description: 《荒原前哨》是一款融合了战术射击、基地建造和生存玩法的爆炸性线上游戏。收集资源，建造坚不可摧的堡垒，然后抵御成群的变种人和敌方团队的进攻。强化你的基地…… 或者眼睁睁看着它化为灰烬。

items.title: 黑漆漆 Demo
items.short_description: 关掉最后一盏灯，在黑暗吞噬你之前回到床上。扮演三名各怀心事的孩子，在令人心惊的睡前挑战中，利用微弱的光源规划逃生路径。 别在黑暗中待太久，“它”就在那里。

items.title: 出击!福建舰
items.short_description: 这是一款航母甲板调度模拟游戏。在有限的时间内尽快让战机准备妥当并起飞迎敌。通过升级战机、使用强力弹药等手段提高消灭敌人的效率。

items.title: Crownborne
items.short_description: A FULLY ENGLISH-VOICED action-romance visual novel. Pulled from the modern world into a kingdom at war, wield an ancient power, romance four heroines, and steer branching battles where every choice you make reshapes alliances, fights, and which ending you reach.

items.title: Doppel Hunter Demo
items.short_description: Blend in, hunt, and outsmart your friends to be the last person standing. Find the real players among clones called "Doppels" to win. Experience random events that make each round unique. A hilarious local multiplayer challenge perfect for a party! 2-6 Players

items.title: The Lost Land Of Bahía Blanca Demo
items.short_description: In this visual novel with light RPG elements, you’ll come out of exile to walk into the bloody belly of a vampiric regime once more in search of a past that still haunts you. Embark on a journey inspired by the horrors of the last Argentine civil-military dictatorship.

items.title: Dino Tendie World Tour Demo
items.short_description: Chicken Dino Tendie Pets: Turn-based RPG battle to extinction! Grab fossils, spin the microwave slot machine to hatch your pet, gear it up, and fight in Battle City. I poured my heart & soul into this, hope you love it!

items.title: Surface Doctrine: Crater Demo
items.short_description: Immerse yourself in the life of Crater — a unique world whose origins remain an unfathomable mystery to its inhabitants. Explore the fates of entire communities and delve into the minds of individuals as you seek the truth amidst the turmoil and unrest of a fading world.

items.title: Framework Zero: Terminal Panic Demo
items.short_description: You are hurtling through space aboard an industrial freighter. The crew already had their hands full with failing systems. But now there is a new threat on board. Something is hunting you. TERMINAL PANIC is a survival-horror "interactive fiction" text adventure RPG with '80s terminal aesthetics.

items.title: Banquet of Nausea~纳希亚盛宴 测试版
items.short_description: 《纳希亚盛宴》是使用RPGMaker制作的黑暗奇幻RPG。玩家将扮演身负使命的少女莉雅，踏上因寻找血亲开始的史诗冒险之旅。探寻圣城的废墟，净化污秽的脓疮孽物，结识在灾变中依然幸存的人们并影响、见证他们的命运。游戏采用了经典回合制玩法，提供了多种装备搭配和职业选择，不同选择都将带来独一无二的战斗体验。

items.title: Regenerengine Demo
items.short_description: Fall into the ENGINE and try to fight your way back up to the surface in this turn-based RPG. As your companions die, consume their essences to grow stronger. Explore a strange underground world with your party, battle creatures roaming the dark, and discover the mystery behind the apocalypse.

items.title: There is no next stop Demo
items.short_description: After the announcement "There is no next stop," you are trapped in an endless subway. But you’re not alone—the "GUESTS" are hunting you. Trust the "GUIDES" to survive. Or don't.

items.title: SLAMPUNKS Demo
items.short_description: 《SLAMPUNKS》是一款支持1-3人的合作割草肉鸽游戏。和你的“怨种队友”物理绑定，在怪海中横冲直撞、大杀四方！疯狂叠加离谱的强化插件，直到你的队友被满屏特效闪到破防。打破游戏引擎的极限，痛扁邪恶巨企，把你们的小队打造成最强终极兵器！

items.title: Rail Estate Demo
items.short_description: Outbid your rivals in auctions for key railway routes, build and upgrade your tracks to dominate the rail economy. Compete to create the most profitable network, balancing speed, capacity, and maintenance in a dynamic simulation

items.title: Bush Dog
items.short_description: Fight the timer to herd variety of different animals like two different sheeps, alpacas, chickens and cows. On unique maps with each round adding more animals.

items.title: Astracide Demo
items.short_description: Wave survival game with dynamically generated weapons and upgrades which rewards consistently good performance with healing and access to powerful abilities that can turn the tide of any battle. Fight your way out of the Astrum and grow your power indefinitely while doing so.

items.title: Idle Isekai Mining Demo
items.short_description: An Idle mining game where your workers keep mining even when you're away! Hire workers, collect manager waifus to automate your mines and boost production. Dig deeper, build and upgrade your mine shafts to earn more gold. Pump those numbers up!

items.title: ESPecial Jobs Demo
items.short_description: Goofy girl with godlike powers may or may not destroy the universe by saving your pet. A comedy puzzle-adventure game for the Game Boy and your computer.

items.title: Despair Beneath the Sunless Sky Demo
items.short_description: A psychological horror RPG blending dark fantasy and mystery. Explore a relentless open world, confront grotesque horrors in turnbased combat, and make irreversible choices. Uncover deep lore and mysteries visible only to those with discerning eyes.

items.title: Road to the Grand Master Demo
items.short_description: A 3D fighting action game where character can grow both in stats and skills collection to worthy title of the Grand Master. Skills are inspired by different martial arts, and can be combined into chain of attacks while character can still be able to fall back on defense.

items.title: REQUIRED SYNERGY WORKSHOP: Deja Damnation Demo
items.short_description: Play the first 3 chapters of a psychological horror visual novel about a corporate training simulation that remembers your choices. Reality glitches. People fade away. Your decisions escalate the dread.

items.title: The Birdsong Tree Demo
items.short_description: A cozy building and light simulation game where you observe birds, create custom birdhouses, and help a living urban tree grow. Balance sound, diversity, and neighbor reactions as you shape a calm, reactive environment.

items.title: 鬼武者 Way of the Sword DEMO
items.short_description: 本作是刀光血影、以牙还牙的极致动作游戏。在面目全非的“京都”，一位佩戴“鬼之笼手”的武士正四处奔波，斩杀猖獗肆虐的幻魔。在激烈的刀光剑影之中沐浴鲜血，不断寻求战斗的意义。前行的道路，终将通往何处？...

items.title: Soulspree Demo
items.short_description: 第一人称弹幕天堂，枪就是你的构筑。搜刮道具、往枪上塞模块，在地狱里越滚越强。打到后来你都不像在玩射击游戏了——怪死得比刷得还快。

items.title: Dev Life: Tap & Code Demo
items.short_description: 在这款开发者模拟器中，每一次按键都是一行代码，每一次点击都让你更接近梦想项目的发布。从互联网角落里的简单脚本开始，成长为真正的科技巨头！

items.title: DEMON'S REIGN Demo
items.short_description: Venture into a dark world ruled by demons, overcome the challenges and defeat the archfiends to gain their power. Explore at your desired order and freely build your character to face impossible battles.

items.title: Sime Returns Demo
items.short_description: Sime Returns Demo is a introduction to quirky, darkly comedic action-adventure about a fisherman, his cats, and the island that decided it no longer likes him. Rescue your cats from furious villagers, and unravel the mysteries lurking beneath the sunny shores of the Adriatic.

items.title: Godless Avalon Demo
items.short_description: An RPG adventure with guns! Explore unique settings and discover secrets. A fantasy comedy with high-stakes and fast pacing.

items.title: Abjure Demo
items.short_description: Win by emptying your hand. Abjure is a roguelike deckbuilder where the 2 of Spades reigns supreme — draft cards, stack relics, and outplay every opponent in a strategic twist on the Big 2 card game.

items.title: FPSCore
items.short_description: Competitive arena based FPS. If you enjoyed the Quake series and are looking for a fast paced, skill based, action packed multiplayer PVP shooter then look no further. FPSCore comes packed with the old school movement mechanics you know and love; bunny hopping, rocket jumping, wall surfing and more!

items.title: Operation Anti-Robot
items.short_description: An endless 2D Platformer Game with Rogue-Like Elements

items.title: Break The Ice Demo
items.short_description: Mine, survive, sell, upgrade, repeat. Descend into a treacherous ice cave filled with relentless monsters and rare loot. Escape with the Miner's Stone to proceed to your next expedition. But watch the frost, if your cabin's temperature drops, your journey ends permanently.

items.title: Sweetie Candy Maze: Coral Peach
items.short_description: Dive into a vibrant candy world! Collect delicious sweets and find your way through playful coral peach mazes in this sweet and colorful adventure.

items.title: WildRoot Demo
items.short_description: A cozy colony sim where survival is gentle—but life is alive. Build, farm, cook, craft and grow your settlement as colonists form relationships, help each other, and shape small, meaningful stories together.

items.title: No Final Run Demo
items.short_description: A quick, skill‑based action game focused on dodging, timing, and survival. Explore a procedurally generated world with infinitely scaling difficulty and compete for the top spot on the global leaderboard.

items.title: Close Call Extreme - Demo
items.short_description: It's Saturday again and you are playing your favorite games on your C64... Close Call Extreme Demo gives you 5 runs of this single player endless racing/dodger with retro vibe and retro challenges. Close call for multiplier, reach milestones for extended time. Wishlist full game for more...

items.title: Cat Secretary Demo
items.short_description: Keep your job by day. At night, sneak around the office and solve your colleagues' problems. Who's a good Cat Secretary? You are!

items.title: Black Hole Idle Demo
items.short_description: 从一个微小的黑洞开始，通过吞噬太空中的物体不断成长。在这款轻松的太空放置增量游戏中，自动化你的力量，解锁升级，并让你的黑洞不断进化。

items.title: Ourlands
items.short_description: Ourlands 是一个温馨的岛屿建造游戏，你可以为友好的岛民们打造独特的小土地。

items.title: Last Ember
items.short_description: We fused deckbuilding and roguelikes into the ultimate single-player experience. Build a unique deck, summon dinosaurs to crush your enemies, and discover powerful relics to protect the Last Ember.

items.title: Just A Gun Demo
items.short_description: Just A Gun is an incremental point-and-click shooter where you evolve a single weapon through a massive upgrade tree.

items.title: Brainrot Survivor Demo
items.short_description: A chaotic survivor-like where absurd “brainrot” creatures clash in fast-paced 20-minute runs. Stack ridiculous builds, unleash tidal power, and break the game with insane synergies.

items.title: Golf-Like Demo
items.short_description: Golf-Like 是一款注重技巧的游戏，在极简却严酷的世界中重新诠释高尔夫机制。围绕精准击球、清晰物理和深思熟虑的决策而构建。易学难精。

items.title: Rayborne Demo
items.short_description: 是一款基于激光、物理机制与实时光线模拟的解谜游戏。通过塑造光线本身来解决精心设计的挑战，并逐步揭开一座充满疑问的 AI 研究设施背后的真相。

items.title: GatherCalm
items.short_description: GatherCalm is a cozy casual game about collecting stickers, opening packs, and decorating your own album. Discover rare finds, create beautiful pages, and enjoy a relaxing atmosphere at your own pace.

items.title: The Last Show Demo
items.short_description: A narrative incremental about fireworks that starts as a hobby and becomes an obsession. Grow your arsenal, fire strategically to stack combos, build grand finales, and grow a rabid fanbase. A journey that begins in your backyard and ends somewhere you didn't expect.

items.title: Astro Colony
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 2,226 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
items.short_description: 探索无尽的宇宙以及创造最有效率的星际殖民地。 构建起输送系统以实现生产自动化。 也要照顾宇航员和他们的需求！ 快來建立新的殖民地作为星际模拟的一部分吧。

items.title: delete.txt
items.short_description: Drag a window to help navigate a bouncy text file to your desktop's garbage bin. The desktop is dark and riddled with deadly corrupted folders and extracting files.

items.title: Forbidden: A First's Obsession
items.short_description: Meet Nemesis; Ascendent being and terminally bored. Until the shimmer at the end of Creation, known as the Void, becomes her fixation - and her undoing. A short linear visual novel with gorgeous hand-painted illustrations; a mythic tale of curiosity and consequences.

items.title: Guinea Pig Gunner Demo
items.short_description: Play as a combat cyborg guinea pig in this run-and-gun 2D action platformer. Use your teleporter gun, and a massive arsenal of weapons to fend off a reptilian invasion.

items.title: Wheel Make It Demo
items.short_description: 一台轮椅，两个玩家，无限混乱。这是一款单人/双人的、基于物理机制的游戏，它讲述了有关合作、犯蠢，以及克服万难的友谊之力的故事。

items.title: Camelot Unchained
items.review_summary: 多半差评 此游戏的 103 篇用户评测中有 28% 为好评。
items.short_description: In Camelot Unchained, three Realms battle for control over resources, dominance on the battlefield, and eternal glory. Enter the world of the long-awaited spiritual successor to classic RvR MMORPGs to stake your claim on the future with large-scale Realm vs. Realm combat, crafting, and all out war.

items.title: WayPoint
items.short_description: 最多可支持 4 名玩家的回合制多人策略游戏。开辟通往终点的道路，或利用毁灭性事件消灭对手。在这个世界上没有好事件——只有希望对手的情况更糟。只有狡猾和策略才能带你走向胜利！

items.title: Haligen Zero
items.short_description: Find the answer in the incident involving the Professor and unravel the secret of the Awakened.

items.title: The Boomies Show
items.short_description: 一款狂热的双摇杆 Roguelite，发生在一个糖果色游乐园变成的大屠杀竞技场中。 双武器、后坐力掌控与模块化构筑。 在一波波攻势中活下去，继续加码，并在演出吞没你之前成功撤离。

items.title: Project DeepWeb: Eternal Nightmare Demo
items.short_description: Project DeepWeb: Eternal Nightmare is a desktop-like adventure game about exploration of the Deep Internet, a sequel to Project DeepWeb. Inspired by Internet lore and real netstalking experience, it tells a story of a person who got stuck in the wrong place at the wrong time.

items.title: BOOTH BUTCHER Demo
items.short_description: A free playable demo of BOOTH BUTCHER, a PSX slasher set in a grimy 1980s cinema. A hooded maniac, a meat cleaver, and no way out. Coming June 2026.

items.title: ScreenSaver Idle Demo
items.short_description: That bouncing screensaver you've been staring at? It's a game now. Watch DVD ricochet across the screen, hit that corner, and unleash a flood of resources — then build your idle empire one bounce at a time.

items.title: OddFauna : Secret of the Terrabeast
items.short_description: Grow the TerraBeast you live on from a tiny patch of land into a whimsical world! In this fully hand-sculpted, playful systemic sandbox, you'll explore vibrant biomes, farm, craft, build, and befriend the wild OddFauna to create a thriving ecosystem.

items.title: Farmer Defense
items.short_description: Grow crops and defend your farm from wild animals trying to get their taste buds on your hard grown crops. Survive entire day for bonus harvest and unlock new Farms. Upgrade your Farm and your Equipment to take on Harder and Bigger Farms.

items.title: Kingdom Conquer
items.short_description: 一款维京题材的第一人称策略游戏。在回合制 KINGDOM 模式中占领领土、扩张定居点、培养战士并发展经济，然后率领残酷的突袭进攻敌方土地并征服一切。

items.title: Unlucky Mummy
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《厄运木乃伊》是一款增量点击类游戏，你的目标是开启一具附有诅咒的石棺。初始成功率只有25%，你能连续找到12件圣物，让木乃伊复活吗？

items.title: Campsite Hustle! - Management Simulator
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 69% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在红岸山谷的中心打造属于你的户外商店与露营地。整理货架，管理库存，建造设施，照顾每一位游客，在大自然的怀抱中一步步发展你的生意。

items.title: Cheater's Table
items.short_description: 规规矩矩出牌？那就先死。Cheater’s Table 是一款 3D 在线社交推理卡牌游戏，出千是核心机制。虚张声势、设下诱饵、把风险越抬越高，在桌上压过你的对手。

items.title: I Am Better Than You
items.short_description: 用荒诞的武器戳破气球，戳破友谊！ 操控一个充满氦气的机器人，在这款混乱的在线竞技游戏中证明谁才是老大。投掷飞镖、订书钉和带刺球，在朋友先戳破你之前把他们炸飞。

items.title: Turbo Horizon Demo
items.short_description: Drive through a vibrant world of color and chaos, smashing obstacles and chasing distance in a relaxing, physics-driven experience. Customize your environment and master the art of controlled destruction.

items.title: Neurospasm Demo
items.short_description: A First Person Roguelike Horde Shooter. Hook your brain into your computer, dive into a game inside a game, unbox and stack unique items, kill weird fleshy enemies, and try the first layer of the game for free

items.title: Keep It Up! Demo
items.short_description: Keep It Up! is a co-op slapstick physics game about keeping a balloon from touching the ground. You and up to three Facility test subjects scramble through chaotic obstacle rooms while slapping, jumping and colliding to keep the balloon up. Will you be able to Keep It Up!?

items.title: Fatekeeper
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 1,322 篇用户评测中有 79% 为好评。
items.short_description: 踏入一个精心打造的世界，这里的残垣断壁低语诉说着昔日的剧变。精通剑术与魔法技艺，利用各种神器和咒语，并通过一系列的抉择，来开创你的道路，在这款第一人称角色扮演游戏中塑造属于你的传奇。

items.title: Don't Step Wrong 2 Demo
items.short_description: A logic puzzle game where the rules are yours to discover. Navigate grids of mysterious blocks, deduce hidden patterns, and use skills and items to forge your own path through each challenge.

items.title: Escape from EloHell Demo
items.short_description: A roguelike single-player game of luck and tactics, which distills competitive ladder climbing into its purest form with one-click matches, win-streak combos, chain-reaction effects. All the satisfaction of reaching Rank 1, none of the toxic teammates or 40-minute hostage games.

items.title: MegaFactory Titan
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 139 篇用户评测中有 78% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一款工厂建设游戏。在恶劣的气候下生存，在无限世界中开采矿石，建造一座庞大的工厂，然后与殖民者、政府、海盗、叛军等进行贸易或交战！

items.title: Cat Music Chaos Demo
items.short_description: Catch flow state on a 70 BPM timer. You don't need to read notes to play. You might learn by accident. Warning: prolonged exposure to classical music. Side effects include humming Ode to Joy at bus stops.

items.title: Little Ghosties Demo
items.short_description: Little Ghosties 是一款温馨的放置型桌面陪伴游戏，可爱的幽灵生活在屏幕上的玻璃生态缸中。孵化、养育并收集独特的幽灵，看着它们从蛋成长为完全成熟的成体幽灵。

items.title: Planet Killer Demo
items.short_description: A physics-driven sci-fi destruction roguelite. Orbit hostile worlds, unleash devastating weapons, and carve real craters into fully simulated planets while escalating planetary defenses fight back.

items.title: Where The Road Fades
items.short_description: “Where the Road Fades” is a short psychological indie horror game. After an accident, you find yourself lost in the woods and seek help in a house but something isn’t right there. Explore, make decisions, and face the darkness. Can you find your way out?

items.title: WASTED Bloodline
items.short_description: WASTED Bloodline is a first-person shooter with stunning graphics, singleplayer botmatch mode, online multiplayer, and cooperative play, featuring long-term support.

items.title: Sudoku Cats Demo
items.short_description: Did the cats run away and leave chaos behind? It's time to tidy up the mess! Put cute furry friends in their right places by solving fun logic puzzles. The perfect relaxation adventure for everyone cat lovers and those who enjoy sudoku.

items.title: Too Soon
items.short_description: Too Soon is a psychological meta-game about waiting, relapse, and opening the game when you probably should not. Every launch is remembered. The longer you stay away, the more the system changes the way it speaks to you.

items.title: Authorisation Engine Demo
items.short_description: Turn a payment desk into a global authorisation network in this offline incremental strategy game about capacity, compute, mandates, quantum audits, and synthetic jurisdictions.

items.title: Cold Transit Demo
items.short_description: Catch your friends hiding in the public transport network, before they manage to disappear. Use bikes, trams, trains and more to move around in the city.

items.title: Cold Transit
items.short_description: Catch your friends hiding in the public transport network, before they manage to disappear. Use bikes, trams, trains and more to move around in the city.

items.title: Ward X
items.short_description: Ward X 是一款独立恐怖解谜游戏，背景设在一所本应被遗忘的废弃医院。探索扭曲走廊并解开谜题，寻找逃脱之路。

items.title: Desktop Oasis Demo
items.short_description: 这是《Desktop Oasis》的试玩版，旨在测试无缝嵌于桌面的性能兼容性。本 Demo 包含单次 30 分钟的“专注番茄钟”模式，完整解锁敬请期待正式版！

items.title: Food Devils Demo
items.short_description: You're the last chef in a post-apocalyptic world. Attract adventurers with monstrous food, make them sign contracts with the Food Devils and organize expeditions to collect wicked ingredients! Customize your characters, build the perfect restaurant and plan every move in this Tactics-RPG Roguelite.

items.title: Remorses
items.short_description: 1991. 调查韦斯特布鲁克宅邸中的巫术传闻。 空气正在慢慢杀死你。打开窗户才能生存。

items.title: Soap Slide
items.short_description: 操作简单，摔得搞笑单人轻松游玩或与好友起畅享混乱。

items.title: 我是卷王（king of exams）
items.short_description: 《我是卷王》是一款角色扮演的轻度ROGUE游戏，玩家将扮演一名中国小学生重走求学路。准备好铅笔、钢笔甚至是荧光笔进行各类考试；拿上妈妈给你准备的开学大礼包；迎接中考、高考；参加学术竞赛；走上人生巅峰。

items.title: 财富磨坊
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 259 篇用户评测中有 77% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款增量游戏中，你必须在每个房间赚到$1,000,000才能逃出该房间。投掷飞镖、玩刮刮乐彩票、解锁自动化，并谨慎选择升级，因为每个房间都会影响所有其他房间。你能逃出财富磨坊吗？

items.title: Bounce On
items.short_description: Get your Bounce On! Roll and bounce your way through 75 challenging platform levels on your adventure home. Each world offers multiple paths for completion, but you can also explore each level to find all the secrets!

items.title: Gargantua Demo
items.short_description: 建造你的宇宙飞船“Gargantua”。发展工业，影响自由市场，在行星之间进行贸易，并守护你的财富。一次失误就可能导致供应链崩溃，引发星际经济危机。在Gargantua中，战争即是利润。

items.title: MeowFactory Demo
items.short_description: 欢迎来到喵喵厂！ 在不远的、压抑的未来，世界濒临毁灭，唯有它们能重启生产！ 对，就是这群打工猫! 通过自动化产线和精打细算的空间规划，来实现完美效率。用传送带连接机器，并最大限度地减少手动（或者说爪动）劳动！ 哦，记得及时把那些爱在传送带上兜风的毛茸茸工作者从机器旁拖走，免得他们把自己的小胡子脸塞进去！

items.title: Your Painting, Sir Demo
items.short_description: A puzzle game about forging paintings using newspaper cutouts. Fool your legally blind boss or lose your job!

items.title: Stonewards Demo
items.short_description: 《Stonewards》是一款支持单人或合作的山脉防御Roguelite游戏。保卫堡垒，守护国王！挖掘资源以解锁角色升级，击退一波又一波的怪物。

items.title: UpMaze
items.short_description: UpMaze is a 2D pixel-art platformer where you guide a small frog through dangerous tower-like levels filled with spikes, saw blades, moving hazards, platforms, and timing-based challenges. Jump carefully, avoid traps, and reach the trophy at the end of each stage.

items.title: System Breakdown Demo
items.short_description: System Breakdown 是一款快节奏的 rogue-lite 射击游戏，玩家在一个苏联赢得冷战的异世界醒来。作为毁灭性武器，玩家将与苏联战争机器人战斗，以解放世界或世界剩余的一切。

items.title: Promethean Thirst Demo
items.short_description: Action combat, mythic equipment form gods, and vampiric thralls collide in this action roguelite. Play through 2 of 5 zones in the early demo and wishlist the full game.

items.title: My Little Cafe Nightmare
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 102 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。
items.short_description: Brew otherworldly coffee for ghostly patrons in a dark, cozy first-person café. Upgrade your shop, manage supplies, and turn a haunted café into a sanctuary amidst nightmares.

items.title: Astral Throne II: Age of the Phoenix Beta
items.short_description: How many times are you willing to die for revenge? Rise from the ashes to uncover a divine conspiracy in this Roguelite Strategy RPG inspired by the classics. Lead an ever-growing team on a continent-spanning quest, fight tactical turn-based battles, and synergize your skills for decisive victory.

items.title: Goddess of Strategy Demo
items.short_description: Experience the first area of this tactical RPG roguelite. Strengthen your heroes, guide them through a range of encounters, and ultimately confront the area boss, the Sin of Wrath itself. Do you have what it takes to defeat it or will Wrath consume you as well?

items.title: TYPER3000
items.short_description: TYPER3000 is a strategic typing game that combines precise typing with action survival and tower defence. By typing quickly, you control attacks, activate defences and adapt to increasing waves of enemies. There is also a multiplayer and COOP function.

items.title: Papa's Mocharia Deluxe
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 102 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Create delicious coffee drinks and cannoli in Papa's Mocharia Deluxe! Create stylish layered lattes in the coffeehouse for Papa Louie's loyal customers while earning tips, points, and Special Recipes. Take a trip in the Food Truck to design and serve your own eye-catching creations!

items.title: Joey The Duck
items.short_description: 加入乔伊，在禁地中展开一场古怪的冒险，寻找传说中的宝藏，体验这款充满魅力的无缝平台游戏！

items.title: EL MINISTRO
items.short_description: A retro-inspired 2D action platformer where you play as a young minister of faith battling demonic creatures across cursed lands. Jump, fight, explore dangerous stages, and purge evil forces to restore peace to a town consumed by darkness.

items.title: Hobby Horse
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 20 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 打造你自己的马头棒，挑战障碍赛道！征服每一场骑乘，赢得奖杯，不断提升，成为最强的马头棒骑士！

items.title: Moonlit Nights
items.short_description: 《月夜》是一款以僵尸末日为背景的基地经营游戏。组建突袭小队外出搜集物资，应对神秘访客，并做出艰难抉择。你能存活多少天？抑或能否重获自由回归正常生活？请明智抉择。

items.title: slimes! Demo
items.short_description: Slimes! brings you dangerous levels of anticipation. With unpredictable bounces, endless cosmetic loot, and many different squishy slimes, you grow your very own slime sanctuary. Collect items, customize your buddy, and watch as the slimes unlock new areas and challenges. It's absolutely sub-slime.

items.title: Shothop Demo
items.short_description: SHOTHOP is a violent retro boomer-shooter blending fast-paced movement mechanics with brutal combat. Utilize movement mechanics, cleanse the robot invasion, and restore the portal defense network. Reboot the grid. Survive the shift.

items.title: BPM Bitcrushed Demo
items.short_description: BPM Bitcrushed: A retro roguelite where every shot, dodge, and jump must sync to the beat. Battle through dungeons where enemies attack in time with the music. Find epic loot and even import your own songs to create a custom, rhythm-fuelled soundtrack for your destruction!

items.title: Father's Heritage
items.short_description: An atmospheric first-person psychological horror game where you explore the secret place your father hid from the family, uncover lost spirits and buried clues, and survive the growing terror lurking within its walls.

items.title: Hyper Bun Buster: Rocket Hammer Action Demo
items.short_description: Take control of Tess, a bunny girl who uses her huge hammer to send enemies flying into other enemies in this top-down bump combat action game! Dodge projectiles, control space and outmaneuver bosses in Arcade mode or explore dungeons, solve puzzles and unlock abilities in Adventure mode.

items.title: Merge Hidden 合成寻物 Demo
items.short_description: 每一个隐藏物体都被一分为二！在精美制作的场景中找到两半、拼合还原，才是真正的「找到」。五大主题场景，脑洞大开的合成组合（草帽+雪人、盾牌+剑），简单上手，适合所有爱解谜的人。

items.title: 放置斩魔录 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款融合放置挂机、回合制战斗与流派构筑的武侠养成游戏。培养角色、组合技能流派、搭配随机装备与独立装备，在领地经营、副本挑战与试练塔中打造属于你的最强阵容。

items.title: Gamba God Demo
items.short_description: 下注、加注、赌上一切，在这款 Roguelite 扑克游戏中挑战 7 个抽牌扑克关卡，踏上成为“赌神”的道路。每一手牌都至关重要，每一次冒险都伴随着风险，而每一次升级都将影响你的最终目标。

items.title: Spud Keeper Demo
items.short_description: Pick up and smash bugs, upgrade your tools to protect your potato patch from escalating waves of pests!

items.title: RE_ALLOC Demo
items.short_description: Master the machine. In RE_ALLOC, you are the architect of execution. Design intricate hardware circuits, write custom assembly code, and optimize data flow across memory nodes. Efficiency is your only metric. Can you reach the kernel, or will your logic fail?

items.title: Mini Mayhem: Flood Fighters
items.short_description: Miniature Mayhem: Flood Fighters is a player-versus-player game for up to 4 players. Weaponless robots come alive and scavenge for toys and batteries while trying to stay alive from each other and the flooding house.

items.title: Wink Out Demo
items.short_description: Wink Out your rivals in this physics-driven 1v1 shooter! Craft clever card synergies, adapt between rounds, and outplay opponents by sending them flying out of the arena.

items.title: Min5 Min - Party Edition Demo
items.short_description: “快速、竞技，且甜美诱人！Min5 Min专为那些寻求在短时间内体验激烈行动的玩家设计。拥有各式各样的角色和强大的武器，你将有至少5分钟的时间在这个风格化的世界中生存！”

items.title: Sunderborn Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款异步多人沙盒游戏，融合了拼图、逻辑游戏、世界探索及策略元素。在这里你就是造物者，从混沌中塑造独属于自己的现实世界。管理你创造的世界，并与其他神明展开角逐！

items.title: Directors cut: Train Demo
items.short_description: Demo version of Directors Cut: Train

items.title: BARDA: 背袋登高
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 23 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《Barda》的世界里，能决定你生死的不是怎么用好剑，而是怎么整理好背包。饥饿、疲劳和疯狂都会占用背包的空间！攀登千变万化的高山，尽力一搏。爬到山顶，撒下爷爷的骨灰，升级营地，一次又一次向高山发起挑战！

items.title: Falling Frog - DEMO
items.short_description: 在洞穴深处迷失的你，将在这款NES风格的复古平台游戏中通过跳跃重返地表。 每一次跳跃都是挑战，每一次落地都是胜利。 但要小心……在深渊中，“前进”本身就是你最大的敌人。 一次失误的跳跃，就会让你回到起点。

items.title: 四方行 Demo
items.short_description: 一位行商走遍山河，以货易货，以诚服人。议价、制造、鉴宝，从大同边塞走到番禺南洋，书写属于你的商路传奇。

items.title: Pixel Washer Demo
items.short_description: 拿起你的高压清洗机，把像素世界刷得干干净净吧！在这款温馨且近乎禅意的游戏中，扮演一只可爱的猪猪，冲走污垢，升级装备，让这座脏兮兮的小镇重现往日荣光。

items.title: The Anomaly Department Demo
items.short_description: 观察、 巡逻、报告。在紧张的短回合游戏中，与您的团队一起发现另类情况。 错误决定会引发混乱惩罚和意想不到的后果。

items.title: Jixo 5: Mask Parade Collector’s Edition
items.short_description: Step into a sparkling carnival of masks, parades, theatres, and puppets, where relaxing puzzles, hidden objects, jigsaw-style boards, and bonus challenges await.

items.title: Vellar Demo
items.short_description: Vellar is a first-person psychological horror game where a family is dead… but the recordings they left behind slowly reveal a version of events that doesn’t match reality. Explore a shifting house filled with impossible rooms, distorted corridors, and uncover a truth that refuses to stay buried.

items.title: One Coin Museum Demo
items.short_description: 启航探索，建立专属治愈系博物馆！在《大秘币博物馆》中远渡重洋，利用机械爪打捞深埋海底的秘宝。将展品公之于众，在收获人气的过程中不断升级船只，前往更遥远的海域探寻奇迹。

items.title: Rescue Guys - Firefighters Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 一款混乱的开放城市救援试玩版，你将在火灾、灾难和荒诞的紧急状况中即兴应对。没有训练，没有规则——只有快速决策、创造性解决问题，以及对这座城市的“初体验”，而它在正式版中只会变得更加糟糕。

items.title: X-Ray 2D
items.short_description: A fast-paced and challenging 2D platformer where precision, reflexes, and exploration are essential to overcome traps, obstacles, and secret-filled levels.

items.title: FC Mafioso: Football Dynasty Manager Demo
items.short_description: A text-based football management game with procedural storytelling, derby drama, and underworld influence. Build your club, shape your manager, and decide how far you’re willing to go to win.

items.title: Planted! Demo
items.short_description: Planted! is a horticultural combat party game where gardens are arenas, produce is ammunition, and 1–4 players settle their differences by growing vegetables and throwing them at each other. Because, why not?

items.title: Sir, We Have an Orc Problem Demo
items.short_description: Sir, We Have an Orc Problem 是一款增量式塔防游戏，你将面对数量惊人的兽人潮。布置并升级炮塔，让炸弹如雨点般倾泻在兽人军团身上。

items.title: Daydream Mosaics 6: Empire - Collector's Edition
items.short_description: Raven and Juliette are getting married—and while they build six magical cities to unite their peoples, Lucas and Reya set out to find the perfect wedding gift. Enjoy 204 colorful nonogram levels plus jigsaw, clutter, hidden object, match 3, and more in this charming Collector’s Edition!

items.title: Ultrapong
items.short_description: Extreme procedural bullet hell. Not ping-pong. It’s ULTRAPONG—where color defines behavior. Battle through a spectrum of 16,777,216 potential enemies where even the slightest chromatic shift alters their mass, size, and acceleration. No clones, just a continuous evolution of movement and challenge.

items.title: MechPit Demo
items.short_description: Build modular robots and operate them through a physical Control Pod in VR. Design, test, and send your machines into the Pit to battle.

items.title: Growing My Manhole Demo
items.short_description: 在这款贪婪的放置游戏中，从井盖成长为黑洞，吞噬整个宇宙。

items.title: Demra: Rifts of War Demo
items.short_description: Classic 90s RTS gameplay mixed with direct hero control and grid-based real-time movement. Command your army and wield powerful light magic to fend off the demon invasion.

items.title: Eclipse: Anomaly Research
items.short_description: 化身伊薇·萨默斯，深入调查一片被诅咒的沼泽。作为一名现场特工，你将直面撕裂现实的异常现象与致命生物。监控摄像头、报告超自然事件、在猎杀中求生，并在时间循环重置一切之前，揭开沼泽的黑暗秘密。

items.title: Asteroid Rodeo Demo
items.short_description: Asteroids are worth trillions. They're also spinning at 200 meters per second. You are a Wrangler—harpoon tumbling rocks, wrestle them to a dead stop with your custom-built ship, and mine them for credits. The pay is good. The survival rate is a conversation people avoid.

items.title: A Fighter's Nova: Mindara Demo
items.short_description: 《斗魂觉醒：明达拉》是一款叙事驱动的日式角色扮演游戏，将塑造角色的叙事体验和精准酣畅的组队格斗融为一体。

items.title: Just Shoot Demo
items.short_description: 在这款动作 Roguelite 游戏中对抗成群的敌人，寻找随机武器并发现隐藏的卡牌组合，打造毁灭性的构筑，在混乱中生存下来。

items.title: Cakey & Tanaka : CandyLand Adventure
items.short_description: Protect the world’s sweetest cupcake! Cakey & Tanaka is a 3D roguelite shooter where you lead a fated duo. If either falls, it’s Game Over! Combine unique spells and unleash Rapid Fire to blast through candy monsters and survive the perils of CandyLand in this high-stakes, sweet adventure.

items.title: Mostly Delivered Demo
items.short_description: Deliver packages and passengers through a chaotic open world city on two wheels, and try not to crash too much. A free taste of the full arcade courier mayhem: ragdoll passengers, wild physics, and an endless score chasing rush that ends in spectacular wipeouts.

items.title: Memo R.I.P. Demo
items.short_description: 拥有900多个手工制作的恐怖事件、实时语音多人模式、最终Boss，以及在被诅咒的飞船上推进的第一人称心理恐怖卡牌游戏。

items.title: Wheelchair For Two Demo
items.short_description: 在一辆轮椅上开启一场混乱的合作冒险。两名玩家各控制轮椅的一侧，必须齐心协力在残酷的障碍、危险的跳跃和基于物理的挑战中幸存下来。支持单人、本地合作或与好友在线联机——一个小小的失误就会让你们同时坠落。

items.title: Dino-Ducks Mayhem
items.short_description: Dino-Ducks Mayhem is a twin-stick shooter with bullet heaven vibes, wrapped around duck-builder system, set in a duck-tastic world and all about surviving as long as you can while everything explodes around you.

items.title: Shadow Monarchs Rise
items.short_description: Shadow Monarch’s Rise is a soulslike action RPG with fast, skill-based combat, many many quests, hidden treasures, epic bosses, and character progression. A Skilltree with epic Powers to unlock! Future updates will include more Skills, areas & Bosses who r gonna make u suffer!

items.title: Warrior's Memory The Hollow Strata Demo
items.short_description: In a world where countless warrior vessels lie dormant, a wandering soul fights for freedom. Build your 20-card deck from over 1,000 cards, then collect, fuse, and upgrade cards as you conquer the Hollow Strata.

items.title: 魔法少女症候群 Demo
items.short_description: 如果魔法少女成为一种职业，需要投简历，面试，签约事务所。每个魔法少女都要穿上战斗服，走进公众的视野，每一场战斗，都会被现场直播。那，怀揣着梦想的少女们，会如何踏上这条充满挑战的路？

items.title: Lost Lures Demo
items.short_description: Demo of the fishing adventure set in the northern wilderness. Learn fish behavior, read the waters and master your lures. Progress through a skill-based journey of quiet patience. Play solo or join friends online to complete shared missions and fish at your own pace.

items.title: Battleship Command
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 65 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款沉浸式二战海战模拟游戏中指挥强大的沙恩霍斯特号战列舰。以第一人称视角漫步甲板，操控炮术、雷达和导航系统，带领舰队航行在大西洋、北冰洋和地中海。与护航队交战，智斗敌军，在战争的惊涛骇浪中生存下来。

items.title: Midnight Nasi Goreng
items.short_description: Experience the grit of the Indonesian night shift. Manage a street food stall through accurate architectural spaces and eerie corridors. In this world of meticulous dread, the grind never ends—and something in the shadows is watching.

items.title: VELATO Demo
items.short_description: VELATO is a Poker-Bluff Roguelike Deckbuilder where players build a Joker-driven economy engine, manipulate AI opponents through bluffing, and survive escalating table pressure across each run.

items.title: My Garage
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 3,786 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: MY GARAGE is a car simulation game with main focus being simulating real car repair, maintenance and physics.

items.title: Container Hunter Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 从深海中打捞失落的集装箱，发掘其中的隐藏价值，并通过拍卖出售，打造你的海上贸易帝国。

items.title: Gobballing
items.short_description: Become the hero no one saw coming! Play as a ambitious goblin who dreams of glory and smashes his way through monsters using nothing but his trusty rock!

items.title: Bookstore Incremental Demo
items.short_description: 一款充满互动性的放置增量游戏，在这里经营你自己的书店！印刷并升级书籍，解锁新顾客、新员工、各种物品等等。

items.title: Phoenix 2
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 222 篇用户评测中有 66% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一款具有经典街机玩法的现代射击游戏！开启史诗级战役，每天参与全新任务。收集、升级并掌握 100 多种独特战机，与其他玩家竞争，证明你是最强的王牌飞行员！

items.title: Fire Fire Royale
items.short_description: Tired of cheaters in 3D shooter games? This fast-paced cheats free 2D PvP battle royale shooter game will be your ultimate choice. Players can try different weapons and experience different battle styles, but most importantly, no cheaters are allowed! Players can also try different customizations.

items.title: Rituals of Demons Demo
items.short_description: A demon-hunting game where you investigate haunted locations, gather evidence to identify the entity, and perform the correct ritual to banish it—before it hunts you.

items.title: Paddle Together Demo
items.short_description: 踩！踩！踩！独自或与好友合作，依靠纯粹的踩踏力量攀登天空中的水道。充满挑战的赛道、混乱与惊喜正在你的上升之路上等待着你。

items.title: 心舞 Demo
items.short_description: 次世代3D换装音舞游戏。海量时装随心搭配，热门舞步神还原，抖音神曲等你解锁。偶遇交友，开启甜蜜心动之旅！
developers: 上海游牛信息科技有限公司
publishers: 辰炎翎网络科技（上海）有限公司

items.title: Economic Biathlon Demo
items.short_description: Test your wits in an arcade quiz. React quickly and overcome tricky challenges. You can set new records and compete in Economic Biathlon.

items.title: 中等生 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一部中式校园（高三）为背景的百合向视觉小说。 只要考上大学，一切都会好起来吗？手牵着手，心跳扑通扑通，我们只是朋友吗？大家说只是开个玩笑，感到不舒服是正常的吗？想要挣脱母亲的期待，这是不孝吗？您将跟随主角周语桐，探索青春期的疑惑，帮她作出选择。

items.title: Nile Express Demo
items.short_description: Build the first railway network in Africa. Create profitable routes in Egypt, from Alexandria to Aswan. Deliver passengers and goods to the right destinations. Take care of your railway network and deal with accidents.

items.title: Shmandala Demo
items.short_description: Shmandala is a delirious arcade-style shoot'em up choreographed to a banging soundtrack!

items.title: BAFF A
items.short_description: Minimalist, hardcore and challenging game in the genre of avoid-em up that will test your reflexes, timing and planning! This game is hard as hell!

items.title: Flamecraft Demo
items.short_description: 《龍焰魔法鎮》是一款支持 1-5 名玩家的策略游戏，充满魔法，轻松惬意。作为守焰人（Flamekeeper），你将帮助可爱的工匠龙找到理想家园。为城镇商店附魔，把龙卡牌放入其中，见证奇幻商业街的活力绽放。

items.title: Neon Sunset
items.short_description: A brave little sun has found himself in endless neon dungeons! Help him jump across platforms, collect coins, dodge devious enemies, and destroy blocks in search of hidden treasures.

items.title: OFFBEAT Demo
items.short_description: OFFBEAT is a music-tycoon game where you build the recording studio of your dreams. Collect and upgrade increasingly strange musical objects, complete jobs for cash, and record real, actual music.

items.title: ULTRA0
items.short_description: Enjoy a simple, easy-to-play pseudo-3D shooter! Upgrade your character with power-ups and take down the approaching monsters before they reach you.

items.title: The Tracy Arm Tsunami Experience
items.short_description: Explore Tracy Arm, Alaska and trigger a massive landslide tsunami in a first-person simulation with land, air, and water viewpoints.

items.title: Atlas Zone
items.short_description: 我们将卡牌与Roguelike类型相结合，并在此基础上加入了基于网格的地图机制。打造独特的牌组，邂逅不同的制作人，组建一支出色的队伍。与你的团队共同发展技能树，掌控整片区域。

items.title: Up Cards
items.short_description: UP CARDS 是一款轻度肉鸽的卡牌类游戏。在这个令人兴奋的游戏旅程中，你需要掌控卡牌局势，打出最佳组合，叠加扭转局势的额外效果，选择自己的永久奖励，通过不同的策略构建，达到更高的巅峰。

items.title: Girlsnite - Anime Building Battle TPS
items.short_description: Girlsnite is a fast-paced anime-style TPS where you build walls, floors, and other structures in real time. Fight intense 1v1 or survival battles, outplay CPU opponents, and customize your experience with VRM characters in this lightweight single-player building combat game.

items.title: FussyCraft Survival: Sandbox
items.short_description: Dig, build, cook, cast spells and survive royal levies in a darkly funny 2D pixel sandbox. Explore dangerous locations, manage resources, fight strange creatures and grow strong enough to challenge the king.

items.title: 抽号小队 Demo
items.short_description: 一款融合了牌组构筑、自走棋、肉鸽元素的策略游戏。玩家需要通过购买、升级棋子来完善壮大你的队伍。通过随机抽取一个数字号码，来触发棋盘中对应棋子的技能效果，并由此获取分数来击败boss。游戏考验你的策略与布局，当然也需要些许运气。

items.title: Invokyr Demo
items.short_description: A forgotten board game. A haunted house. Play with up to 4 friends. Roll the dice, survive the horrors that are summoned, and beat the Gamemaster to win your freedom.

items.title: Ruin Adventurer
items.short_description: ‘Ruin Adventurer’ is an automation game with survival and programming elements. Use your robots to ensure your survival, automate resource gathering, and ultimately escape the ruins.

items.title: Space Bross
items.short_description: 你的鸡被绑架了，这一切足以让一位退休宇航员陷入银河大混乱。《Space Bross》是一款手绘风格的2.5D塔防与动作肉鸽游戏，在这里你将建造基地，抵御外星敌群，并穿越各个星球，奋力夺回你毛茸茸的朋友。

items.title: Match Cards: Football
items.short_description: Change the course of football history in a tactical sports card game. Lead national teams through authentic tournaments since 1916, play cards on the virtual pitch, and decide the fate of legendary matches in fast, few-minute clashes.

items.title: Collie Companion
items.short_description: A cozy desktop idle game where your personal collie companion lives on your screen—play, feed, and bond!

items.title: Space Fleet Logistics Demo
items.short_description: Wars are won by logistics. Command the Federation's fleets across a star system, manage supply chains, secure planets, and outmaneuver a relentless AI enemy. Every battle is decided before it begins.

items.title: Run Run Iguana!
items.short_description: Make the iguana chase the delicious leaf for as long as possible! As the iguana runs after the leaf, you will encounter obstacles that the iguana must avoid. If the iguana catches the leaf, runs into an obstacle, or if you drop the leaf, the run will end!

items.title: Soft(A)ware Demo
items.short_description: A surreal puzzle-platformer where you bend gravity, rewind time, and disrupt a virtual prison built to contain you.

items.title: 白色归途
items.short_description: 操控一个白色小方块，解开谜题，收集■●●●，到达终点。

items.title: DeMon Researcher 2
items.short_description: A third-person sci-fi survival horror shooter. Enter the Green Dungeon, battle AI-transformed enemies, and uncover the devastating truth behind a monster born not from evil, but from a mother's grief. Explore, survive, and face what hides in the dark.

items.title: Japanese with Mayu Demo
items.short_description: A short Japanese-learning visual novel where you play as an exchange student in Japan, learn vocabulary through everyday conversations, and check words instantly with a hover dictionary.

items.title: All Possible Suspects Demo
items.short_description: A point-and-click deduction game where you unravel complex events. Explore frozen moments in time, analyze the scene, and fill in the blanks. Piece together the who, how, and why behind each curious scenario.

items.title: My First 3D Printer Demo
items.short_description: Remember buying your first 3D printer? Now imagine having twenty. Manage your workshop, fulfill orders, and build the business you always dreamed of.

items.title: GANA FORCE Demo
items.short_description: 《加纳力量》 是一款横版飞行射击游戏，猛烈地射击敌人，巧妙的回避子弹，利用地形迂回周旋。宇宙场景包含细胞关卡、火海太阳、冰洞穴，宇宙战舰等等，强力的BOSS和弹幕等你来挑战！！

items.title: Iron Stars Demo
items.short_description: Iron Stars is a realistic space 4X strategy game where you explore believable star systems, colonize planets and moons, grow your population, and turn entire solar systems into industrial empires.

items.title: 扑通心跳小屋
items.short_description: 《扑通心跳小屋》能够让你沉浸在自己的空间中并放松下来，专注于独属于个人的美好。

items.title: Tokamak Hand Demo
items.short_description: Tokamak Hand is a turn-based monster-taming RPG. Confine wild Thermons within fields, forge bonds of resonance, master diverse builds and battle across a continent teetering on the edge of imbalance. Every capture tips the scales—will you restore order, or unleash chaos?

items.title: 松木村 ( Pinewood Village )
items.short_description: 一款轻松休闲的城市建造游戏，你需要连接板块来建造一个温馨的村庄。放置板块，旋转找到最佳排列方式，并通过策略性放置获得星星奖励。

items.title: 咸鱼搬运工 Demo
items.short_description: 4人在线合作，推车捡货、翻车互坑、对抗猛兽——交够价值才能回家。【试玩遇到任何 BUG 请随时戳我们！有啥想法或想唠嗑的也尽管来，一起成为“鱼鱼朋友”吧！】🐟

items.title: Academy of Samsara Demo
items.short_description: Answer right to deal damage, answer wrong to take it. Die and reincarnate with no items but the same level. 6,000+ trivia questions across 7 categories. Master challenging lore, interact with haunting characters, and break the loop in a world brought to life through 90s retro anime art.

items.title: Rejected Draft Demo
items.short_description: 你本是被弃置的残缺涂鸦。迎战各式草图强敌，吞噬对方力量，踏上复仇之路。这款双屏放置对战游戏中数值将飞速暴涨，庞大技能树搭配随机转生机制，每一轮冒险都独一无二。

items.title: Komo: A Sunlit Journey - Demo
items.short_description: 在温柔治愈的世界中悠闲度过的元宇宙聊天应用。漫步于美丽的自然风光中，或围坐在篝火旁聊天。在喜欢的地方摆上桌椅，拿出美食和饮品放松身心。独自一人或与他人一起——在你喜欢的地方，享受属于你的时光。

items.title: KI Lab — Neural Pipeline Simulator
items.short_description: Build a neural AI pipeline from nodes, technologies and upgrades. Connect, optimize and scale your AI beyond limits

items.title: Aakihiko Aaruberutasu Aadisony Aazumeragi: SRPG Tactical
items.short_description: A parallel story in the Prince x Princess universe. Sky Soldiers invade the continent, led by a commander who has already conquered a neighboring kingdom. Prince Akihiko and the princesses must fight back and defeat him through tactical battles to restore peace.

items.title: FerryMan Demo
items.short_description: Revolt against death itself. Every outcome by the roll of your dice. Sacrifice boons given to you from your crow companion and tip the odds in your favor. Die, grow stronger, unlock more boons, and fight toward the Reaper who bound you to this endless cycle.

items.title: Ommetaphobia Demo
items.short_description: Ommetaphobia is a shoot-em-up horror atmospheric arcade game that takes you into your mind to face the fears that have been embedded within you. Use your lighter to burn the watchers, collect energy and sparks from them to further enhance your lighter, and last until the medicine kicks.

items.title: Slots & Sword & Magic Demo
items.short_description: Slots & Sword & Magic 是一款回合制类 Rogue-like 老虎机游戏，每一次旋转都有可能打破你的构筑并触发疯狂的连锁组合。

items.title: 天机•大唐重构 Demo
items.short_description: 《天机：大唐重构》是一款架空晚唐题材的 2D 横版卡牌构筑 Rogue-like 游戏。玩家将扮演穿越到唐末的现代理科生，组建物理、化学等科学流派卡组，在五代十国的混乱残影中探索、破甲、识破敌人意图，并用现代知识重塑大唐命运。

items.title: ABSOLUTE TOFU Demo
items.short_description: ABSOLUTE TOFU is a one-button jumping game.

items.title: Space Cat Arcade Adventure Demo
items.short_description: A chill arcade-style space runner where every run ends in discovery.

items.title: Soul Land: Awakening World
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 24 篇用户评测中有 41% 为好评。
items.short_description: The first-ever 3D open-world MMORPG of the Soul Land saga is here! Featuring dual-authorization from the original novels and anime—this time, redefine the Soul Land universe!

items.title: 四面楚歌 Demo
items.short_description: 《四面楚歌》是一款回合制策略游戏，在战棋游戏基础上，引入了可转动的魔方棋盘机制，让战场地形瞬息万变，巧妙融入了机关任务和卡牌技能。玩家将控制多个英雄，搭配不同职业，运用多种卡牌技能，在棋盘地图上开启机关与敌人正面交锋。

items.title: How To Grow a Black Hole Demo
items.short_description: How To Grow a Black Hole is about... well... how to grow a black hole. Manage your black hole, feed it to gain mass, and prevent catastrophic collapses. Compete globally or against your friends to achieve the biggest black hole. Maybe you'll be #1.

items.title: The Book of Prosperity Demo
items.short_description: A 2D Action RPG set in a surreal pixel-art world where ancient magic seeps through Hong Kong-inspired streets. Pulled into a parallel dimension ruled by the Circle, Cyrus must master rhythmic combat, rooftop parkour, and forbidden truths to uncover the cost of a world built on false prosperity.

items.title: Idle Primes Demo
items.short_description: A horror incremental game about clicking prime numbers across expanding grids. Discover new ways to find primes faster, smarter, and weirder. ████████████████████ Belphegor's ██████!

items.title: ALIGNMENT Demo
items.short_description: 一款以道路工程设计为核心的建造与驾驶游戏。在这个 Demo 中，你可以创建道路，调整平面线形和纵断面，布设匝道，并让系统根据地形自动生成桥梁、隧道和边坡。完成设计后，进入场景驾驶车辆，从真实行驶视角检验曲线、坡度、路线选择与工程结构带来的空间体验。当前内容仍在开发中，界面、性能、车辆手感和设计规则都会持续优化，更多玩法也会在后续版本中加入。

items.title: Smiley Battle
items.short_description: Roam a confusing maze with your smiley, sneak up behind unsuspecting opponents or get right in the middle of a fight and throw color bags at each other. Earn money to unlock powerups that turn you into a ghost, a vampire or even hand you a nuke to give you an edge in the battle for supremacy.

items.title: 球打球 Demo
items.short_description: 在《球打球》中，你可以自由选择4颗参数可调的强力球战士，为他们选择最佳的升级路线，同时使用你的策略、反应以及对物理的理解，在四角笼中实时操作它们，打败同样在不断成长的对手。游戏支持0~8人，在线/局域网/本地同屏游玩。

items.title: SporeWars
items.short_description: A top-down survivor roguelite where you battle endless waves of mutant fungi. Level up, choose powerful upgrades, and outlast the Mycelord's ever-growing horde. How long can you last?

items.title: Throne of Cards Demo
items.short_description: 用寥寥几张卡牌建立一个王国。堆叠并组合卡牌，收集资源、训练士兵、解锁强大的牌组，并围绕统治者、神器与生存打造你的策略。

items.title: In The Roots Of The Mountain
items.short_description: Mine deep into procedurally generated caves, gather rare ores, upgrade your pickaxe, and explore an ever-changing underground world. Build your fortune with a shopkeeper, swing across caverns with your grappling hook, and uncover ancient treasures in this relaxing 2D pixel mining adventure.

items.title: Saw Rush Demo
items.short_description: Control a powerful neon saw in this physics-based incremental clicker! Smash rocks, collect valuable fragments, buy massive upgrades, and deploy automated drones to maximize your destruction. Can you push your numbers to the limit? Perfect for fans of idle and arcade progression.

items.title: 拯救小狗
items.short_description: 拯救小狗是一款轻松有趣的寻物解谜游戏，你将在充满与变化的房间中，打败邪恶的老巫婆，拯救可爱的小狗们

items.title: Soul Card Duel
items.short_description: A deckbuilder where position and direction make combats more tactical. Flank enemies with 8 attack directions and combine cards to win in any situation. Explore procedural maps, create decks and armor to customize your hero, and forge your legend in the region's grand tournament.

items.title: Unclean Water
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 44 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《秽水》是一款以逃离玛莲下水道为背景的第一人称Roguelike动作游戏。利用敌人的弱点进行攻击与格挡，配合猛击、盾击等招式击败暗杀组织“夜藓苔”的刺客。不断解锁形形色色的家具与道具，让每一次无止境的挑战都走向成功吧。

items.title: 结晶姬的迷宫 Demo
items.short_description: 《结晶姬的迷宫》是一款以“探知不可视者、逃离迷宫”为核心的恐怖冒险游戏。

items.title: SCP: Blink Demo
items.short_description: Uncover the origins of SCP-173 in the abandoned exclusion zone surrounding Chernobyl. Told through the lens of found footage recordings, explore a hidden facility where Soviet secrets should have remained forgotten.

items.title: Sunrise
items.short_description: Sunrise is a 2D platformer high-speed hack and slash, featuring the ability to create and share levels you make to the world!

items.title: Rattle Spring demo: the crow's room
items.short_description: Rattle Spring is a surreal, eerie puzzle adventure inspired by Rusty Lake. When your cousin vanishes from her family’s desert health resort, you must adventure into unsettling spaces, cryptic characters, and generational trauma to solve the interconnected puzzles and uncover the truth.

items.title: Maze 95 Ultimate Demo
items.short_description: 曾让一代人着迷的那座迷宫回来了。它曾是一个屏保。但现在？你终于可以亲自走过那些走廊。或者只是放松看着它，就像从前那样。

items.title: Capybaria Demo
items.short_description: 最温馨又最疯狂的水豚游戏！在温泉里泡澡放松，建造建筑杰作，成家立业……然后开车狂飙、飞向太空，或者决定是否让总统引爆核弹。你的业力将决定这个世界的命运！

items.title: A Game About Getting Bigger Demo
items.short_description: 一个关于变大的游戏是一款以不断成长的黑洞为核心的打宝增量游戏。摧毁天体，让中心的黑洞变得越来越巨大。

items.title: Panic Poopers Demo
items.short_description: You desperately need to find a toilet before having an accident! Navigate through a procedurally-generated house, avoid the house hold residents, collect items that aid you, and reach the washroom before you run out of time!

items.title: An Exercise in Mortality - Chapter I
items.short_description: Slip into the role of a detective and find out why a seemingly peaceful village suddenly has to hold a funeral every other day. To solve the mysteries, act as the perpetrator and simulate the crimes. Left completely to your own devices, it’s up to you to prove your ingenuity and wit.

items.title: The Son of Stone Demo
items.short_description: Play as Sosruko, a warrior born from stone, and fight through mythic battles using three distinct combat styles and stone bending abilities.

items.title: Witness the Dark - Episode 1 - Bloody Burger Demo
items.short_description: Experience the first night shift at Billy's Burger. You escaped a serial killer. Now you're hiding, working nights in a small-town diner. But the hallucinations won't stop—and the customers seem to know you. A free demo of the psychological horror narrative.

items.title: GAME.exe 2 - Phantom Strike
items.short_description: 你找到了一台旧电脑，上面安装着一个被遗忘的程序：Phantom Strike。只有一台服务器仍然在线，被时间冻结，等待有人完成这场对局。加入后，你发现记分板早已在运行，沉默的队友从未出现，而服务器已运行了多年。最初的怀旧好奇逐渐变成对某种更加诡异事物的坠落。

items.title: PROBABILITY KING Demo
items.short_description: A solo or multiplayer roguelike about coin flipping, probability manipulation, and paying debts. Miss the deadline? Play Russian Roulette. One bullet quickly becomes six.

items.title: Destroy The Moon Demo
items.short_description: A cosmic survivors-like where every upgrade brings you closer to becoming a living superweapon. Burn through alien hordes, rupture pocket dimensions, escape black holes, and survive the cosmic war for the Moon.

items.title: Cards Of Calling Demo
items.short_description: This demo includes the first act of Cards of Calling, featuring 1 playable summoner, 3 summonable creatures, elite and boss encounters, and a preview of the card, relic, and event systems. The full game is planned to include additional acts, summons, events, and content.

items.title: Mini Sushi Factory Demo
items.short_description: Become the Sushi Factory Master! Build machines, discover recipes, and perfect your automation lines.

items.title: Shrimp Escape
items.short_description: A fast-paced arcade survival game where you dodge predators, navigate dangerous waters, and master precise movement to help a shrimp escape capture. Play through a story-driven journey or test your skills in endless survival mode.

items.title: The Sleepless Nights Origins Demo
items.short_description: A first-person psychological horror walking simulator. The same rain-soaked corporate street, looping. Notice what's wrong before it notices you back.

items.title: Freefall '95
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 48 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款快节奏的街机冒险游戏中，连锁巨型特技连击，躲避致命残骸，追逐超高分数。在这趟1995年的厄运航班上，赚取硬币、升级能力、收集稀有物品，并揭开一段狂野的、扭曲时间的剧情。

items.title: Heroes of the Triangle: Mask Rush Demo
items.short_description: In this chaotic party game, you must hold onto the sacred Lunara Mask as long as you can. Oh! But your rivals will try to beat it out of your hands. Move with agility to chase down or escape from your opponents, and sabotage their attacks with precise parries. Who can complete this hilarious ritual?

items.title: Forty Foes Demo
items.short_description: 握紧铁拳，战斗一触即发……！《Forty Foes》是一款横版清版动作冒险游戏，致敬《双截龙》（Double Dragon）、《忍者蛙》（Battletoads）和《时空忍者》（Turtles in Time）等街机黄金时代的传世经典。

items.title: Dark Eyes - Super Soldier 2 Demo
items.short_description: Continue the fight in the Dark Eyes universe as the Super Soldier battles the Delma and the elite Alpha commander. Experience fast-paced combat, massive battles, stealth, upgrades, and powerful abilities in this chaotic sci-fi action shooter.

items.title: Channel 453 Demo
items.short_description: A gothic psychological thriller romance visual novel. A man inside the screen calls your name — as if he has been waiting for you.

items.title: A Factory Roguelike
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 设计高效的生产流水线，以满足不断增长的箱子需求。策略性地选择奖励礼包和研究模块，扩建你的工厂并优化效率。

items.title: RobotzZz Demo
items.short_description: A robot, after humanity. The beat builds the world. Chase it or fall behind. Chain pickups, build combos, survive three stages of escalating rhythm.

items.title: Politisim Demo
items.short_description: Run for President of the United States. Fight through a state-by-state primary, pick a running mate at the convention, trade blows across every televised debate, and hold your coalition together on election night — one decision a week, in a country paying attention to every one.

items.title: DarkStone Restoration Demo
items.short_description: Darkstone Restoration brings the classic action RPG back to modern PCs with improved stability, compatibility, controls, readability, and quality-of-life improvements — while preserving the spirit of the original game.

items.title: Necroforge: Outbreak
items.short_description: Fight through a dark fantasy outbreak in this action roguelite. Survive escalating waves, shape your build with relics and upgrades, and climb the online leaderboard in score-driven runs.

items.title: The Blood Mage 2 Demo
items.short_description: The Blood Mage 2 is a turn-based Puzzle/Dungeon Crawler RPG hybrid. You play as a blood mage, so your health doubles as mana pool. Fight against different creatures and explore the environments to reach your goal!

items.title: Beyond the Soil: Farming & Tales
items.short_description: 《超越土壤：农场与故事》将耕作与生存完美融合。建造属于你自己的农场，在荒野中求生。完成任务，拯救你忠诚的狗狗，并与好友在线合作，体验史诗般的乡村冒险。

items.title: Final Strategy
items.short_description: 《最终战略》是一款严肃、现代的即时战略游戏，专注于大规模战争与直接单位操控。指挥精英部队，与时间赛跑，阻止一场由冷战遗留武器库所构建的失控核行动。

items.title: Monkey Wave Demo
items.short_description: Monkey Wave is a fast-paced action clicker where you defend your banana stash against waves of hostile apes. Click rapidly to defeat primates and epic bosses in solo, co-op, and PvP modes. Deploy strategic abilities and survive the chaos of the jungle.

items.title: Shock and Gnaw
items.short_description: Shock and Gnaw is an FPS where you fight an ever growing horde of monsters with a "gun-game" like model for earning new weapons. Kills will earn you stronger weapons. As time progresses, the monsters will become stronger, so take them out as fast as you can before they outpace you!

items.title: Bloobs Adventure Idle
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 529 篇用户评测中有 88% 为好评。
items.short_description: A massive RuneScape-inspired idle RPG built for long-term progression. Train 24 skills, defeat bosses, collect over 500 souls, and bank offline time to accelerate your progress whenever you choose.

items.title: 凉面爱情故事 demo
items.short_description: 这是一部轻松愉快的短篇视觉小说，您将通过不同选项指引男主走向不同结局。原本是历史学研究生的许埠，在放弃学业后，成为了一名老师，但本该平凡的人生却因一次学校的“内定”，而朝向着另一条航道前进。

items.title: Chrome Survivor Demo
items.short_description: Chrome Survivors! the DEMO! Augment your characters, level up, destroy hordes of vile enemies looking to crash the concerts! This is a Demo for Chrome Survivor, a horizontal slice that has no time limit, only a limit on some features as explained in the description.

items.title: Blood Welkin Demo
items.short_description: Slaughter hordes of abominations and buy upgrades to build your kit to become the ultimate killing machine. YOU ARE NOT CRAZY.

items.title: Glass Hand
items.short_description: Build card queues, clear escalating Nodes, unlock new decks and Modules, and chase satisfying combo turns in a chill glass-and-water deckbuilding roguelike.

items.title: Lil Laundry Lane Demo
items.short_description: Run a hand-painted little laundromat that's all yours. Take in orders from the neighborhood's regulars, tend each load with care, and sink into the soothing rhythm of cleaning clothes.

items.title: BomBom Saga Demo
items.short_description: Puzzles, limited ammo and cute and outgoing humanoid Kokeshi doll robot with an AI that becomes self-aware.

items.title: Ragdoll Chimps Demo
items.short_description: 《Ragdoll Chimps》是一款基于物理的沙盒游戏，拥有超大的开放世界和丰富多样的活动。种植、采矿、钓鱼、收藏品、任务、自定义、战斗、竞速、小游戏，应有尽有！支持单人游戏、分屏合作模式以及PVP对战模式。

items.title: PinRogue Demo
items.short_description: PinRogue is a pinball roguelike. Build up points and multiplier by hitting bumpers, score satisfying combos, purchase powerful upgrades in the shop and create game-breaking builds!

items.title: Set In Stone Demo
items.short_description: Explore a unique level and fight a boss! Get a taste of Set In Stone's platforming and fighting mechanics without getting the main game spoiled. This small sample contains secrets to find and bits of lore, can you find them all?

items.title: 维度核心：紫水晶 Demo
items.short_description: 一款Roguelite策略塔防游戏。每局不同的塔、事件与强化。统筹资源，协同作战，守护维度核心。

items.title: Olmari ja T-paita
items.short_description: A narrative game about a hypothetical Finnish e-sport commentator legend whose daily life unravels through the act of putting on t-shirts. Dive into Olmari’s world – where did that t-shirt wander off to this time? Challenges arise!

items.title: Dark Lessons Demo
items.short_description: 你被困在了自己老师的家中，手上唯一能够对抗黑暗的，只有一根摇曳不定的蜡烛。在这个洛夫克拉夫特式的噩梦中，你需要破解重重谜题，揭开这个家族扭曲的过往，并找到逃出生天的方法。不过当心：阴影中还潜伏着别的什么东西……此外，似乎有个声音在哀求你的帮助。

items.title: The Victor Initiative
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: The Initiative was a Welsh government facility that was mysteriously abandoned in the 60s, with rumours of terrifying supernatural threats lurking inside. Will you take the plunge?

items.title: Immortal Dao Idle Demo
items.short_description: Immortal Dao Idle Reborn as a heaven-defying genius in a brutal mortal world, harness ancient Qi, shatter realm barriers, and crush rivals in this addictive idle cultivator inspired by xianxia or wuxia novels.

items.title: Perspective Protocol Demo
items.short_description: Perspective Protocol is a first-person puzzle game where you manipulate perspective to solve puzzles. Switch between 2D and 3D to overcome obstacles and escape the facility of the evil Dr. Gamblebert.

items.title: SHED Demo
items.short_description: Flush your friends. Burn the deck. SHED everything. SHED is a competitive card-shedding game where your goal is simple: get rid of everything before your opponents do.

items.title: Iris Dissolution Demo
items.short_description: 《Iris Dissolution》 是一款经典生存恐怖游戏——在愈发诡异的场景中探索，管理匮乏的资源，与骇人的怪物浴血求生，同时在失去中挣扎着寻求和解。

items.title: Space Savory Demo
items.short_description: 在一个不太遥远的星系中... 一家卫生状况堪忧的餐馆，充满了黑暗的秘密和黑色幽默，位于宇宙虚无的中心。 欢迎来到 Space Savory。别被外表欺骗——宇宙中最美味的味道就在这里烹饪。 (仅限于可观测部分。)

items.title: Wrecking Wave
items.short_description: Wrecking Wave is an explosive action game with physics-based destruction focused on Challenge and Speedrun. Unleash a wave of chaos and smash cities, chase high scores and stop a mad scientist from polluting your ocean with toxic waste.

items.title: Entropy Demo
items.short_description: Entropy is a tactical turn-based RPG inspired by classic JRPGs. Assemble your party of mercenaries and forge your own path towards an expedition into hell to stop the demonic incursion. Choices you make along the way will determine the fate of your world.

items.title: Inseco Demo
items.short_description: To survive a dying world, you must witness the end of humanity. Experience a high-tension point-and-click horror adventure where every brutal choice shapes your fate. As the world molts into something monstrous, how much of your humanity will you shed to survive the swarm?

items.title: Ctrl+Alt+Defeat Zero Humanity Demo
items.short_description: 一款2D Roguelike生存遊戲，講述機器人在世界末日對抗荒誕的人類領袖的故事。遊戲包含一波又一波的敵人、建築系統、史詩級Boss戰，以及為征服南極洲的玩家準備的無限模式。混亂從未如此令人興奮。

items.title: Chef Knight
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 169 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款温馨的奇幻风格增量成长游戏中，你需要通过猎杀获取烹饪原料。斩杀怪物，将它们变成美味佳肴，打造你自己的地下城美食帝国！

items.title: Stick Scholars Demo
items.short_description: A social deduction party game where players parkour to school, answer trivia, and hunt down a hidden Class Clown who is sabotaging to try and make the entire group fail!

items.title: BRUMLEY Demo
items.short_description: A co-op zombie horde shooter set in a West Yorkshire town gone very, very wrong. Fight off waves of the undead, collect coins, buy bigger weapons, and uncover the dark secret rotting at the heart of Brumley. Up to 8 players. No survivors expected.

potential_items.title: Astro Colony
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 2,223 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 探索无尽的宇宙以及创造最有效率的星际殖民地。 构建起输送系统以实现生产自动化。 也要照顾宇航员和他们的需求！ 快來建立新的殖民地作为星际模拟的一部分吧。

potential_items.title: Camelot Unchained
potential_items.review_summary: 多半差评 此游戏的 103 篇用户评测中有 28% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: In Camelot Unchained, three Realms battle for control over resources, dominance on the battlefield, and eternal glory. Enter the world of the long-awaited spiritual successor to classic RvR MMORPGs to stake your claim on the future with large-scale Realm vs. Realm combat, crafting, and all out war.

potential_items.title: Fatekeeper
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 1,322 篇用户评测中有 79% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 踏入一个精心打造的世界，这里的残垣断壁低语诉说着昔日的剧变。精通剑术与魔法技艺，利用各种神器和咒语，并通过一系列的抉择，来开创你的道路，在这款第一人称角色扮演游戏中塑造属于你的传奇。

potential_items.title: MegaFactory Titan
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 139 篇用户评测中有 78% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 一款工厂建设游戏。在恶劣的气候下生存，在无限世界中开采矿石，建造一座庞大的工厂，然后与殖民者、政府、海盗、叛军等进行贸易或交战！

potential_items.title: 财富磨坊
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 259 篇用户评测中有 77% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在这款增量游戏中，你必须在每个房间赚到$1,000,000才能逃出该房间。投掷飞镖、玩刮刮乐彩票、解锁自动化，并谨慎选择升级，因为每个房间都会影响所有其他房间。你能逃出财富磨坊吗？

potential_items.title: My Little Cafe Nightmare
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 102 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Brew otherworldly coffee for ghostly patrons in a dark, cozy first-person café. Upgrade your shop, manage supplies, and turn a haunted café into a sanctuary amidst nightmares.

potential_items.title: Papa's Mocharia Deluxe
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 105 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Create delicious coffee drinks and cannoli in Papa's Mocharia Deluxe! Create stylish layered lattes in the coffeehouse for Papa Louie's loyal customers while earning tips, points, and Special Recipes. Take a trip in the Food Truck to design and serve your own eye-catching creations!

potential_items.title: Battleship Command
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 65 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在这款沉浸式二战海战模拟游戏中指挥强大的沙恩霍斯特号战列舰。以第一人称视角漫步甲板，操控炮术、雷达和导航系统，带领舰队航行在大西洋、北冰洋和地中海。与护航队交战，智斗敌军，在战争的惊涛骇浪中生存下来。

potential_items.title: My Garage
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 3,786 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: MY GARAGE is a car simulation game with main focus being simulating real car repair, maintenance and physics.

potential_items.title: Phoenix 2
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 222 篇用户评测中有 66% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 一款具有经典街机玩法的现代射击游戏！开启史诗级战役，每天参与全新任务。收集、升级并掌握 100 多种独特战机，与其他玩家竞争，证明你是最强的王牌飞行员！

potential_items.title: Bloobs Adventure Idle
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 529 篇用户评测中有 88% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: A massive RuneScape-inspired idle RPG built for long-term progression. Train 24 skills, defeat bosses, collect over 500 souls, and bank offline time to accelerate your progress whenever you choose.

potential_items.title: Chef Knight
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 172 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在这款温馨的奇幻风格增量成长游戏中，你需要通过猎杀获取烹饪原料。斩杀怪物，将它们变成美味佳肴，打造你自己的地下城美食帝国！

potential_items.title: Arcane Merchant
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 56 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在中世纪奇幻世界的中心地带开设你自己的店铺！从药水和宝剑到神秘水晶和传奇神器，应有尽有，让你的货架琳琅满目。设定价格，赢得顾客的信任，成为镇上最富有的商人！

potential_items.title: 汽水侠
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 623 篇用户评测中有 78% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 汽水即是抛瓦! 在《汽水侠》中化身超级汽水侠，捏爆汽水罐，用汽水的力量对抗邪恶外星人！在充满未知的宇宙中，探索神秘星球，搜集稀有汽水，打造专属的汽水武器，体验畅快淋漓的泼水射击快感！【现已全面支持中文】

potential_items.title: 破碎怪谈：恶意关注
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 《破碎怪谈：恶意关注》是“破碎怪谈”系列的第二部作品，《破碎怪谈：恶意取关》的前传。你将在一个地狱一般的世界中挣扎求生。恐怖的怪物如影随形，阴森的环境让人毛骨悚然，每个角落似乎都潜藏着秘密与危险。准备好进入这个充满惊悚和黑暗的世界，直面来自内心的极度恐惧。

potential_items.title: Gum Squad
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 80 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Gum Squad is a co-op PvE shooter set in a quiet world gone sticky. Start with a peashooter, explore together, and gear up to survive the gum epidemic with up to 8 players!

potential_items.title: Starship Theory
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 1,104 篇用户评测中有 50% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Starship Theory is a ship building survival game. Mine and trade to gather resources. Plan and construct new upgrades. Train and manage crew. Fight to survive.

potential_items.title: Reincarnated as a Dark Lord Before Taking Over the World with Power 999999999
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 极具挑战性的解谜小说RPG。转生为魔王，制定策略，征服世界。*非放置挂机游戏*

potential_items.title: 跳舞的线
potential_items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 616 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 随着音乐引导一条无限延伸的线条通过不同的环境。点一下屏幕以转弯，从而因应眼前不断变化的世界做出相应的反应及避开障碍物。

potential_items.title: Collision Course
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 293 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: An asteroid is hurtling toward the planet! Sneak, scavenge and blast your way through an immersive prehistoric world filled with Humans, Dinosaurs, Droids and Mother Nature’s fury!

potential_items.title: Alien Market Simulator
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 97 篇用户评测中有 85% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在你的太空站经营市场。修复并升级太空站，扩展服务，并向各种外星顾客销售商品。体验在太空中管理企业和扩大市场的挑战。

potential_items.title: Anomaly Zone Renovation
potential_items.review_summary: 多半差评 此游戏的 105 篇用户评测中有 22% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: A-Zone Renovation is a continuation of the legendary Zone, combining the classic stalker atmosphere with revised mechanics. A large-scale rebalancing, from weapons to economy, a new role-playing system, an improved interface, PvE and PvP activities - the Zone is ready to grow with its community.

potential_items.title: CYBERMATRIX
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 123 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: CYBERMATRIX 是一款快节奏的移动游戏。在这款游戏中，你的动作风格非常重要。

potential_items.title: Reaper Actual
potential_items.review_summary: 特别差评 此游戏的 52 篇用户评测中有 13% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 《Reaper Actual》是一款开放世界持续型射击游戏。在饱受战火摧残的辽阔岛屿马罗瓦上,数百名玩家以Tier 1特战员「Reaper」的身份投入战场,彼此交锋,同时对抗占据全岛基础设施的5支NPC势力,在节奏紧凑的FPS战斗与PvPvE对抗中争夺主导权。借助海陆空载具穿梭于五种不同的生态环境,从高强度的HVT行动到稀有资源的采集,培养你的Reaper、经营自己的基地,完成任务以获取装备,并亲手改写这片土地的格局。

potential_items.title: 群星收割者 Starvester
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 387 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 一款简短的增量游戏，围绕着扩展一个横跨整个恒星系统的工厂，在太空中建造巨型超级结构。部署成群的无人机，开采资源，解锁升级，并收集恒星的能量！

potential_items.title: Trakonius
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 155 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: In the merciless sands of the arena, a gladiator is forced to fight for survival. Trakonius defies Mars, the God of War, in this Action Roguelike experience! Face gladiators, mythological creatures, and deadly challenges across four brutal arenas. The truth can only be revealed through combat!

potential_items.title: 别碰蜗牛
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 69 篇用户评测中有 84% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 世界首款「反治愈系」放置游戏。你只有一条命。一只蜗牛将无休止地追逐你。一旦被它碰到，你将永远无法再次游玩。

potential_items.title: 暴杀残雨之夜
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 59 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 残雨之夜，给予爱或残忍在你一念之间。
